objects: java.lang.String userName, java.lang.String retUserName, char[] password
constraints: The second parameter of the constructor PasswordAuthentication(java.lang.String,char[]) is never hard coded.
events: There are 3 methods in this class that are called to use the class correctly.
order: PasswordAuthentication(java.lang.String, char[]) has to be called once., The next block can be called arbitary times., 	getPassword() has to be called once., 	or, 	getUserName()has to be called once.
requires: neverTypeOf[char[] password, java.lang.String null], notHardCoded[char[] password]
